features: Folliculitis Scalp Psoriasis Treatment Shampoo: Seborrheic Dermatitis, Dandruff & Itchy Scalp Relief with Salicylic Acid, Piroctone Olamine, Rosemary & Coconut Oil

Nourishing Natural Ingredients: A blend of Rosemary Leaf Oil, Rice Water, and Biotin nourishes and strengthens hair from root to tip. Rosemary Leaf Oil promotes healthy hair growth by stimulating blood circulation in the scalp. Rice Water strengthens strands and adds shine, while Biotin supports overall hair health and thickness for fuller, more vibrant hair.

Scalp & Hair Revitalizing: Infused with Caffeine and Coconut Oil, this shampoo revitalizes the scalp and promotes healthier hair follicles. Caffeine encourages natural hair growth, while Coconut Oil deeply moisturizes, smooths, and prevents dryness. Together, they leave both scalp and hair feeling refreshed, nourished, and hydrated.

Soothing, Oil Control & Freshness: Hydrates and calms the scalp, alleviating discomfort while restoring balance for improved scalp comfort. This formula controls oil, leaving the scalp fresh and balanced, and helps smooth and detangle hair for a silky, frizz-free finish.
Simple Application: Apply to wet hair, massage into the scalp, leave for 3-5 minutes for optimal absorption, then rinse thoroughly. For best results, use regularly.
